name: Aster
text: Moon. Starfall knew your wake before I saw Sunset on the horizon.

name: Moon
text: Then you know I will not turn aside. Move.

name: Aster
text: No. Every Core you broke sharpened the grief behind you.

name: Moon
text: Selkie is ahead of me. I have no time for another keeper's lesson.

name: Aster
text: That is why I am here. Face one honest obstacle before you face her.

name: Moon
text: Then raise your staff, Aster. I will answer honestly.
